title: Dimension Object
description: Dimension annotation on a PCB board or schematic sheet that displays measured distances, angles, or radius.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

properties.name: dtype
properties.description: Measurement style of this dimension.

properties.name: extlength
properties.description: Length of the extension lines, in internal units.

properties.name: extoffset
properties.description: Offset of the extension lines from the measured points, in internal units.

properties.name: extwidth
properties.description: Width of the extension lines, in internal units.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Identifier of the object.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: layer
properties.description: Layer number (1-based index into the layer stack).

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

properties.name: precision
properties.description: Number of decimal places in the displayed value.

properties.name: ratio
properties.description: Character width to height ratio.

properties.name: size
properties.description: Text height (character size), in internal units.

properties.name: unit
properties.description: Unit type for the displayed dimension value.

properties.name: visible
properties.description: True if the dimension value is visible; false if hidden.

properties.name: width
properties.description: Line width of the dimension stroke, in internal units.

properties.name: x1
properties.description: X coordinate of the first measurement point, in internal units.

properties.name: x2
properties.description: X coordinate of the second measurement point, in internal units.

properties.name: x3
properties.description: X coordinate of the third point, in internal units.

properties.name: y1
properties.description: Y coordinate of the first measurement point, in internal units.

properties.name: y2
properties.description: Y coordinate of the second measurement point, in internal units.

properties.name: y3
properties.description: Y coordinate of the third point, in internal units.
